name: Frituras De Caracol (Columbian Conch Fritters
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Conch meat, pounded and chopped finely
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine all ingredients except baking powder, flour, egg, and olive oil. Set aside.
2. In another bowl, sift the baking powder and flour together and mix with the egg.
3. Add the first mixture to the egg mixture, stirring well, and let stand for 5 minutes.
4. Heat oil in a frying pan until it reaches 380°F (200°C).
5. Carefully drop dough balls into the hot oil and cook until golden brown.
6. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
